scripts.firmware:esp32s3:build: bash -lc 'export IDF_PYTHON_ENV_PATH=/Users/vamshikrishnaramasamy/.espressif/python_env/idf6.2_py3.10_env; source /Users/vamshikrishnaramasamy/esp/esp-idf/export.sh >/dev/null && cd firmware/esp32s3-sim && idf.py -B build-esp32s3 set-target esp32s3 build'
scripts.viewer: npm run generate && npm run cad:stl && npm run viewer:assets && vite web --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.viewer:build: npm run generate && npm run cad:stl && npm run viewer:assets && vite build web --base /oso-keyboard/
